ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Please choose a BibTex file with .bib extension.
ast.target: 请选择一个带有 .bib 扩展名的 BibTex 文件。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Please enter the path of an existing BibTex file in your vault.
ast.target: 请输入你库中现有 BibTex 文件的路径。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Please enter a valid positive integer number for the delay.
ast.target: 请输入一个有效的正整数作为延迟。

ast.name: textContent
ast.target: 请输入文件夹路径。

ast.name: textContent
ast.source: Folder does not exist yet — it will be created when first used.
ast.target: 文件夹尚不存在 — 首次使用时将创建。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: PDF bookmarks are currently being resolved using the AppleScript resolver, which you can inspect for transparency by clicking the button below. We recommend switching to the faster compiled binary; the only downside is that it cannot be directly inspected.
ast.target: PDF 书签目前通过 AppleScript 解析器解析，你可以点击下方按钮查看其实现以确保透明。我们建议切换到更快的编译二进制文件；唯一的缺点是无法直接查看其内容。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: If security is a concern, you can review the
ast.target: 如果你关注安全性，可以查看

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: and compile it yourself; see the
ast.target: 并自行编译；请参阅

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 了解说明。

ast.name: appendText
ast.source: The plugin offers a range of commands to insert citations and open the attached PDF files.                     You can review the commands and their hotkey assignments by visiting the
ast.target: 该插件提供了一系列命令用于插入引文并打开附加的 PDF 文件。                     你可以访问以下位置查看这些命令及其快捷键分配：

ast.name: appendText
ast.target: 配置窗格。

ast.target: 错误：无法打开文件：

ast.name: log
ast.target: 未找到活动的编辑器。

ast.name: log
ast.target: BibDesk 集成：书签解析器已就绪。

ast.name: log
ast.source: PDF++ plugin cannot be monkey-patched because it is not loaded.
ast.target: PDF++ 插件无法进行猴子补丁，因为它未加载。

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 在脚本编辑器中打开

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 下载并使用二进制文件

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.target: 打开设置

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open bookmark_resolver.scpt in Script Editor to review what it does.
ast.target: 在脚本编辑器中打开 bookmark_resolver.scpt 以查看其作用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Download and enable the faster compiled binary. You can revert in Settings.
ast.target: 下载并启用更快的已编译二进制文件。你可以在设置中还原。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Open the plugin settings to configure the resolver or suppress this notice.
ast.target: 打开插件设置以配置解析器或关闭此提示。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Full path of the BibTex file to be imported. Note: this is the absolute path on                     your computer and is not referred to the vault.
ast.target: 要导入的 BibTeX 文件的完整路径。注意：这是你电脑上的绝对路径，不指向库。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A delay in milliseconds before importing the BibTex entries after the plugin has loaded. This may be useful to make Obsidian more responsive on start.
ast.target: 插件加载后导入 BibTeX 条目之前的延迟（毫秒）。这可能有助于让 Obsidian 在启动时更响应。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this option is enabled, information about the parsed BibTex files are provided in the developed console.
ast.target: 如果启用此选项，将在开发者控制台中提供已解析的 BibTeX 文件信息。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A folder in your vault containing the placeholders from PDF++ (e.g.: "00 Meta/PDF++")
ast.target: 库中包含来自 PDF++ 占位符的文件夹（例如：“00 Meta/PDF++”）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If this option is enabled, the placeholders are stored in subfolders named by the year of the publication.
ast.target: 如果启用此选项，占位符将按出版年份存储在子文件夹中。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The AppleScript used to resolve BibDesk bookmark links. Open it in Script Editor to inspect what it does.
ast.target: 用于解析 BibDesk 书签链接的 AppleScript。在脚本编辑器中打开以查看其功能。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable the faster compiled Swift binary instead of AppleScript. The binary is downloaded from GitHub Releases.
ast.target: 启用更快的已编译 Swift 二进制文件，替代 AppleScript。该二进制文件从 GitHub Releases 下载。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Do not show the performance notice when resolving bookmarks via AppleScript.
ast.target: 通过 AppleScript 解析书签时不显示性能提示。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: BibDesk Integration: failed to download bookmark resolver script. PDF bookmark features will be unavailable.
ast.target: BibDesk 集成：无法下载书签解析脚本。PDF 书签功能将不可用。

ast.source: BibDesk Integration: failed to download bookmark resolver binary.
ast.target: BibDesk 集成：无法下载书签解析二进制文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An error occurred when parsing the BibTex file. Check the development console for more details.
ast.target: 解析 BibTex 文件时发生错误。请检查开发者控制台以获取更多详细信息。
